Package com.linkedin.alpini.base.hash

Class Crc32

java.lang.Object
com.linkedin.alpini.base.hash.Crc32
All Implemented Interfaces:
Checksum
public final class Crc32 extends Object implements Checksum
CRC32 algorithm as used by Deflate.
